justification: The diff correctly migrates Spring Boot 2 to 3 and Java 17 to 21, updating dependencies (jakarta, mysql-connector-j, springdoc) and replacing deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter with SecurityFilterChain beans. It uses Java 21 features like text blocks and List.getFirst(). However, it introduces spurious churn by removing the spring-boot-starter-test dependency (line 66-70 in pom.xml) and the @Test import in Demo1ApplicationTests.java (line 4), which would break tests. The security configuration also simplifies user setup to only 'admin', potentially altering application behavior.
